title: Unshaken

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Light breaks through the darkness
My salvation's here to stay
When shadows try to shake me
My fortress shows the way
No enemy can break me
No fear can make me fall
For in Your house I'm standing
Behind Your mighty walls

sections.label: Chorus
lines: One thing I seek, one thing
I need To dwell within Your courts eternally
Though armies rise against my soul You are my light,
You make me whole (Repeat)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: When storms of life surround me
You hide me in Your grace
While others may reject me You never turn Your face
In times of tribulation You lift my head up high
Your beauty is my passion Your presence is my prize

sections.label: Chorus
lines: One thing I seek, one thing
I need To dwell within Your courts eternally
Though armies rise against my soul
You are my light, You make me whole

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I know that I will see it
Your goodness in this land
Though waiting tests my spirit
I'll trust in Your command
My heart will not be shaken
My song will not be stilled
For every step I'm taking
Is guided by Your will

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: One thing I seek, one thing
I need To dwell within Your courts eternally
Though armies rise against my soul You are my light,
You make me whole (You are my light,
You make me whole)

epigraph: that I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my
